intro: It's time to take on Solitaire Challenge.
description:
Conquer challenging card configurations and take on a big, vibrant game with several levels of varying difficulties. 

Weekend Solitaire Summer Village dives into a bright world filled with vibrant gameplay, colorful animations, and hours of addictive card-solving fun! 

Enjoy an exciting journey through 130 levels of various complexities, each presenting a unique challenge that will put your solitaire skills to the test. 
Get ready to unwind and bask in the joys of summer with Weekend Solitaire Summer Village!
